description: AHCA: Operating rooms for general surgery minimum 360 sq ft net clear floor area exclusive of fixed casework.
citation: Florida AHCA 59A-3.081 FAC / FGI 2022 as adopted

description: AHCA: Single-occupancy patient room minimum 120 sq ft clear; semi-private room minimum 100 sq ft per patient.
AHCA: Intensive care cubicle minimum 150 sq ft clear; open ward minimum 120 sq ft per bed.
AHCA: Emergency treatment rooms minimum 120 sq ft; dedicated trauma bays minimum 200 sq ft.
AHCA: All new hospitals and substantial renovation require Agency notification and architectural plan review per Florida CON process.
AHCA: Florida requires hurricane-resistant construction for all licensed health care facilities in wind zones — Category 3 or higher.
citation: Florida Building Code — Health Care Facilities / FBC Chapter 4

description: AHCA: Surgical suites minimum 15 ACH total airflow, 3 ACH outside air, positive pressure, 90% DOP filtration.
AHCA: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width; exit corridors minimum 8 ft per NFPA 101.
